variants.title: RVR10015B200B
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RVR10015B200B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RVR10015B200B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Outer Diameter: 80.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 42.2 mm, Length: 159.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 30 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 30 BAR, Seal: Viton
